content:
# Session 16 — Recommendations for next plan iter

## MUST-FIX (block downstream / flagged by review subagents)
1. **Blueprint `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange` step-(iii) "final assembly" paragraph is inadequate
   (tos016 must-fix).** Dispatch a **blueprint-writer** for `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` to rewrite the
   final-assembly paragraph (~L3449) per the `% NOTE:` already placed there: (a) the S1^h slide is NOT
   "exactly as D1′" — it needs a bespoke `hslide` (the `.symm` of `sheafificationCompPullback h`
   naturality, in the goal's `.app/.hom`/`Functor.comp_map`-unfolded spelling); (b) Sq3
   (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp`) and Sq4 (`pullbackValIso_comp`) are `pullbackValIso`-ENTANGLED (sheaf-
   pullback `((pullback f).obj M).val` vs presheaf-pullback `Fp_f M.val`) and must be discharged together
   as ONE chase, not separately. This is the HARD-GATE chapter for the D3′ prover lane — fix before the
   next prover round on `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`.

## HIGH — closest-to-completion target
2. **`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` step (iii)** — resume from a fully-documented point (no re-derivation
   needed; the post-step-(ii) goal, the proven `hslide`, and the recipe are all in-file). Concrete next
   moves, in order:
   1. **Cheap unblock:** re-extract the *post-split* goal (insert `exact (rfl : (0:Nat)=0)` before the
      L3399 sorry, read the type mismatch), copy `R5 ≫ a_Z.map (Fp_h.map δ_f)` **verbatim** into
      `hslide`'s LHS, then `erw [reassoc_of% hslide]` will key. (One build to extract, one to confirm.)
   2. **Then the entangled merge** (the real wall): do NOT build Sq3/Sq4 as separate bricks. Mirror the
      D1′ paste `pullbackTensorMap_natural`: fold `a_Z.map δ_h ≫ a_Z.map tcomp ≫ S3 ≫ S4` (and the RHS
      tail) into single `a_Z.map` of presheaf morphisms, then reduce to a presheaf equation closable by
      `δ_natural` + `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` (L1860) + `pullbackValIso` substitution.
   - **Reuse:** the `comp_cancel_mid`+`exact` instance-crossing device (iter-015) for any further
     `Scheme.Modules`-vs-`SheafOfModules` boundary; the `comp_δ`-is-definitional fold for any other
     `a.map δcomp`.
   - **Mode:** `prove`. This lane is well-scoped; no new frontier brick needs building first.

## DO NOT retry (same blocker, needs structural change first)
- Splicing the slide via the **direct** `sheafCompPb h` naturality (`erw [← reassoc_of% (… .hom.naturality
  …)]`) — pattern-not-found, spelling mismatch. Use the bespoke `hslide` route above.
- Splicing `hslide` **without first re-extracting the post-split goal spelling** — 3 variants all
  pattern-not-found this iter. The LHS must be goal-verbatim.
- Building `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp` / `pullbackValIso_comp` as **isolated** bricks to plug separately
  — their arguments differ (`pullbackValIso`-bridged); they only discharge as one interleaved chase.

## Coverage debt (1:1 Lean↔blueprint) — list for the planner to blueprint
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafifyMap_δcomp_split` (TensorObjSubstrate.lean L2993) — NEW this
  iter. Step (ii) of D3′; the `a_Z.map` image of the `comp_δ` decomposition of the composite presheaf-
  pullback tensorator. Deps: `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp` (definitional δ), `Functor.map_comp`. Slots
  under `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange` step (ii) (chapter already references `pullbackComp_δ`; this
  is its sheafified `a.map` splice form). `private` — a blueprint mention/`\label` without `\lean` pin
  may suffice (cf. `comp_cancel_mid`'s "no separate pin" note), but tos016 flagged its non-trivial
  instance-pinning statement as warranting at least a mention.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.comp_cancel_mid` (iter-015, still unmatched) — step (i) generic
  cancellation lemma; also still lacks an entry.
- Bulk ~93 other `lean_aux` nodes = standing 1:1 debt (scheduled Coverage + file-split phase).

## Process note (not a prover task)
- **Stale file header (aud016 major):** the `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` doc-comment header (L43–49) claims
  THREE tracked `sorry` residuals (citing `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`, which is proven); actual = 2.
  The review agent cannot edit `.lean`; flag to the next prover (file owner) to refresh the header
  sorry-count when it next touches the file.
